title: Help find missing man
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George police are asking...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George police are asking for the public’s help to find Theunis Jonker (59) who was reported missing by his family on Wednesday 4 December.

Jonker was last seen leaving his home on Nortier Street, George South, on Monday 2 December, but he never returned. At the time, he was wearing a navy long-sleeve shirt, white shorts, and grey Crocs.


> A search is currently underway, and the police are urging anyone with information to come forward.


If you know anything about Jonker’s whereabouts, please contact Sergeant Ryno Blignaut at the George Detective Branch on 044 803 4715 or call Crime Stop on 08600 10111.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
